item.title: 🇪🇺 EU Approves 21st Sanctions Package Targeting Russian Economy
item.description: European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen announced the EU's 21st sanctions package, saying Russia's economy is "slowing sharply" as the bloc expands restrictions on Moscow's war machine.

item.title: 🇪🇪 Estonia's President Sees Summer Window to End Ukraine War
item.description: Estonian President Alar Karis said Europe should prepare now for possible peace talks and continue pressuring Russia through sustained sanctions and military support for Ukraine.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine and Latvia Sign Drone Technology Agreement
item.description: President Zelenskyy announced a drone deal with Latvia during the Nordic-Baltic summit in Estonia, as Ukraine offers to share its drone expertise with allies.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China and Georgia Elevate Ties to Strategic Partnership
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping and Georgian President Mikheil Kavelashvili exchanged messages upgrading bilateral relations to a comprehensive strategic partnership, deepening ties in the Caucasus region.

item.title: 🇰🇪 One Killed in Kenya Protest Against US Ebola Quarantine Center
item.description: At least one person was killed during a demonstration against the construction of an Ebola quarantine center for US citizens in central Kenya, highlighting local opposition to the facility.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Israel Strikes Historic Port of Tyre in Lebanon, Killing Eight
item.description: Israeli forces struck the southern Lebanese city of Tyre, killing at least eight people in an escalation that adds strain to peace efforts in the broader Middle East conflict.

item.title: 🇺🇸💰 US Trade Deficit Narrows as Exports Hit Record High in April
item.description: The US trade deficit shrank in April as exports surged to unprecedented levels, bolstered by energy shipments and potentially contributing to quarterly economic growth.

item.title: 🇨🇳🤖 China Exports Surge Past Forecasts on Global AI Boom Demand
item.description: China's export growth accelerated in May, driven by strong demand for chips, electric vehicles, and high-tech goods fueling the global AI boom, providing relief amid energy price pressures.

item.title: 🇨🇳 US Lawmakers Push for Stricter Chipmaker Rules on China Supply Chains
item.description: A bipartisan group of US lawmakers urged tighter regulations on contract chipmakers supplying Chinese firms, calling for stronger export controls to protect American technological advantage.

item.title: 🌍 UN Chief Guterres Calls for End to Violence in Middle East
item.description: UN Secretary-General António Guterres called for an immediate end to violence in the Middle East, urging all parties to de-escalate and pursue diplomatic solutions amid the Israel-Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia-Ukraine: NATO Drones Detected Over Lithuania and Romania
item.description: Unidentified drones were detected over NATO territory in Lithuania and Romania, raising concerns about potential escalation as the alliance monitors Russian activity near its borders.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Israel-Iran Conflict Explained: No Boots on the Ground
item.description: Analysis of the Israel-Iran conflict dynamics, explaining why neither side is committing ground troops despite escalating aerial and missile exchanges.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Sanctions Networks Enabling Settler Violence in West Bank
item.description: Britain imposed sanctions on networks it says are enabling settler violence in the occupied West Bank, targeting individuals and organizations involved in extremist activities.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Delivers First Far-Side Moon Samples to Russian Scientists
item.description: China shared the first samples collected from the far side of the Moon with Russian scientists, marking a new chapter in Sino-Russian space cooperation and scientific exchange.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia Holds Naval Drills in Baltic Sea During NATO Exercises
item.description: Russia conducted naval exercises in the Baltic Sea coinciding with major NATO drills in the region, a show of force amid heightened tensions between Moscow and the Western alliance.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Satellite Images Suggest Israeli Air Base Hit in Iranian Missile Strikes
item.description: Satellite imagery indicates damage to an Israeli air base from recent Iranian missile strikes, providing visual evidence of the impact of Iran's retaliatory attacks.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Helsing AI Drones: US Army's Flytrap System Explained
item.description: The US Army's new Flytrap system integrates Helsing AI-powered drones for enhanced battlefield awareness and autonomous operations, representing a major advancement in military drone technology.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Man Killed in Car Explosion Outside Moscow Military Personnel Area
item.description: A man was killed in a car explosion in a residential area for military personnel outside Moscow, with Ukrainian media reporting the incident as part of ongoing asymmetric warfare.

item.title: 🇫🇷 France Bans Israeli Finance Minister Smotrich Over Gaza Comments
item.description: France banned Israeli Finance Minister Bezalel Smotrich from entering the country, condemning his statements promoting the "recolonization" of Gaza and expansion of West Bank settlements.

item.title: 🇧🇬 Bulgaria Halts Military Aid to Ukraine
item.description: Bulgaria announced it would stop providing military aid to Ukraine, marking a shift in Eastern European support as Kyiv faces continued pressure from Russian forces.

item.title: 🇫🇮 Finland Defense Committee Backs Nuclear Weapons Transport Law
item.description: Finland's parliamentary defense committee approved changes to allow nuclear weapons transport through Finnish territory during crisis situations, aligning with NATO requirements.

item.title: 🇵🇭 Philippines Accuses China of Aggression Near Scarborough Shoal
item.description: The Philippines accused Chinese vessels of aggressive maneuvers near Scarborough Shoal in the South China Sea, escalating maritime tensions in the disputed waters.

item.title: 🇺🇸⚔️ US Helicopter Downed Near Strait of Hormuz, Pilots Rescued
item.description: A US military Apache helicopter went down near the strategic Strait of Hormuz, with both crew members rescued safely amid heightened regional tensions.

item.title: 🇮🇷💥 Iran-Israel Standoff: Ceasefire Holds After First Major Clash
item.description: Iran and Israel appeared to stand down after their first major direct confrontation since a US-backed ceasefire took hold, with both sides signaling de-escalation.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Trade Data Beats Forecasts as Exporters Rush Orders
item.description: China's May trade data exceeded analyst expectations as exporters accelerated shipments amid strong global demand for chips, electronics, and AI-related technology.
